_comment: Production overlay — set LUMO_REGISTRY_PATH=/app/config/agents.registry.prod.json in the orchestrator deployment. Base URLs must point at the agent's public hostname (behind CloudFront/ALB). version pins MUST be exact in prod.

agents._notes: Flip enabled=true after Duffel live mode + Seller of Travel compliance review.

Enabled=false until OpenTable affiliate approval. The stub works in dev; prod should not ship user-facing 'book a reservation' traffic against mock data. Flip to true once OPENTABLE_PARTNER_ID+OPENTABLE_API_KEY are set on the restaurant agent's prod env and opentable-real.ts is fully wired.

Enabled=false on prod until amadeus-real.ts is implemented and promoted from test.api.amadeus.com to api.amadeus.com. The stub is fine in dev/vercel preview; prod should not ship real 'book a hotel' traffic against an in-memory catalog. Flip to true once AMADEUS_CLIENT_ID+AMADEUS_CLIENT_SECRET are set on the hotel agent's prod env AND the real client carries search/availability/create/cancel.
